titleStmt.title: SII 29.106: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 106. (A.R. No. B. 577 of 1961-62.) KURAḌI, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab near the temple known as Nelaguḍi.

The record is damaged and incomplete. It is engraved at the bottom of the slab containing record No. 75 above. The record says that the mahājanas of (agrahāra Rūḍi) made a grant of land of 4 mattar extent measured in the rod Beṁkoḷvana kōlu to the temple of Vāsudēva at the place during the reign of Chālukya Jagadēkamalla II. It is said that Mācharasa had made a request to the mahājanas for a little more land grant earlier at the time of the installation of the deity in the temple of god Vāsudēva built by his father Madhuvapayya-nāyaka.
The record is dated in the regnal year 10 [of the king] Pra[bhava]. Māgha, ba. 2, Sunday corresponding to 1148 A.D., February 8, Sunday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī maccāḷukya pratāpa cakravartti jagadēkamalladēva varṣada 10 neya pra
rada māgha bahuḷa 2 Ādityavāradaṁdu śrī matsarvvanamasyadagrahāraṁ
Aśēṣa mahājanaṁgaḷu madhuvapayya nāyakaru māḍisida śrīvāsudēva
ṣṭheyaṁdu Avara magaṁ mācarasanu taṁma dēvarige kiṟidu bhūmiyaṁ kuḍalu
mahājanaṁgaḷaṁ bēḍalu Ā mahājanaṁgaḷu kāruṇyageydu hiriya keṟe
ḍiyiṁ baḍagalu madyakadalli munnamūrāgi garuḍagaṁbada janārddana
diṁ pattire mūḍalu beṁkoḷvanakōlalu nālku mattaru kayyaṁ Ā (mara)
dēvargge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . śrīmanu mahāpradhānaṁ matta
yyadaṇḍanāyakaru hiriya gobbūra Accina moḷeya
yya nāyakaru māḍisida śrī vāsudēvarige
Digital edition of SII 29.106 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
